description: بحث شامل عن أي جهاز بلوتوث على النظام
command_preview: Write-Output '=== All PnP Devices with Bluetooth in name ==='; Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Bluetooth' -or $_.FriendlyName -match 'Bluetooth' } | Select-Object Status, Class, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 300; Write-Output '=== Network adapters with Bluetooth ==='; Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Bluetooth' -or $_.InterfaceDescription -match 'Bluetooth' } | Select-Object Name, Status, InterfaceDescription | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 300; Write-Output '=== Bluetooth radio check ==='; Get-PnpDevice -FriendlyName '*Bluetooth*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Status, Class, FriendlyName | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 300
